title: Glossary, Card UX Overhaul, The Architect Fix
features: Game Terms glossary — 28 in-game definitions (Block, Discard Pile, Fatal, Forge, Replay, etc.) parsed from all 14 languages with new /api/glossary endpoint
Keywords & Game Terms page — keywords and glossary terms displayed together, categorized by Combat, Mechanics, Card Zones, Map Rooms, Progression
Individual SEO pages for each glossary term at /keywords/{id} with structured data
Interactive word tooltips — power names, keyword names, and glossary terms in card descriptions are underlined with hover tooltips linking to their pages
Green upgrade highlighting — upgraded card values render in emerald green so you can instantly see what changed
Contextual upgrade replacement with pluralization (e.g. 'Draw 1 card' → 'Draw 2 cards')
Keywords shown inline in card descriptions (gold text, matching in-game appearance)
Filter state persisted in URL across all list pages (cards, relics, monsters, potions, enchantments, encounters, events) — filters survive back navigation, refresh, and are shareable as links
Back button on all 17 detail pages preserves navigation history
fixes: The Architect event page now shows content — detected as Ancient event, populated with per-character dialogue and monster sprite
Tinker Time event — resolved unresolved template variables in Sapping, Choking, and Expertise choices
Coolheaded+ and similar cards — ambiguous number replacement now uses var name context to replace the correct value
Card detail tooltip clipping — tooltips (Shiv, etc.) no longer hidden behind card boundary
Removed DMG/BLK stat boxes from card grid and detail pages to reduce duplication
Removed type emoji from card grid to prevent text overflow on mobile
api_changes: GET /api/glossary — list all game term definitions
GET /api/glossary/{id} — single game term by ID

changes.new: So the arch demon’s thrall has arrived?
